name: Hawaiian Tropic Loungewear Living Room
description: Influencer lifestyle portrait on sofa wearing branded yellow loungewear with KAWS artwork in background
input_prompt: woman lounging on sofa in yellow Hawaiian Tropic outfit with modern art background

subject.description: young woman with long wavy blonde hair and light fair skin, natural relaxed beauty

skin.details: visible tan lines on chest, slight flush on cheeks

clothing.details: featuring text 'HAWAIIAN TROPIC' in brown serif font with hibiscus flower and palm graphic
visible at waist and thigh area

accessories: small tattoo on left inner forearm

large vertical art piece with red background featuring KAWS-style figures in blue and black

grok-imagine.prompt: Woman with wavy blonde hair lounging on grey sofa in yellow Hawaiian Tropic tube top and shorts, modern living room with KAWS-style art on wall, gold jewelry, warm ambient lighting, relaxed influencer vibes

gpt-image-1.5.prompt: A young woman with long wavy blonde hair is reclining comfortably on a dark grey textured sofa in a modern living room. She wears a yellow strapless tube top with 'HAWAIIAN TROPIC' printed in brown serif font alongside a hibiscus flower and palm tree graphic, paired with matching yellow shorts. Her accessories include a gold pendant necklace, small gold hoop earrings, and she has a navel piercing visible. Her fair skin shows natural tan lines on her chest and a slight rosy flush on her cheeks. She has a friendly, relaxed expression with engaging eye contact. Behind her, the grey walls feature wainscoting panel molding and two pieces of art: a large vertical piece with red background featuring KAWS-style figures in blue and black, and an abstract piece with gold and black tones. A modern linear wall sconce provides warm ambient lighting that creates a cozy atmosphere. The image has a 2000s digital camera aesthetic with natural skin texture visible. No watermark. No artificial smoothing. Realistic texture.
gpt-image-1.5.notes: Natural language paragraphs, explicit preservation constraints, no quality tags

seedream-4.5.prompt: Young woman with wavy blonde hair lounging on grey textured sofa wearing yellow Hawaiian Tropic branded tube top and shorts. Fair skin with visible tan lines, gold pendant necklace and hoop earrings. Modern living room with KAWS-style art on red background behind her. Warm diffused lighting creates cozy atmosphere. Influencer lifestyle photography, 35mm portrait lens, shallow depth of field, natural skin texture. Not airbrushed, not cartoon-like.
seedream-4.5.notes: Coherent natural language, subject first, concise photography terms, inline style negation

flux-kontext-max.prompt: A young woman with long wavy blonde hair reclines on a dark grey fabric sofa in a modern living room. She wears a yellow strapless Hawaiian Tropic tube top with hibiscus graphics and matching yellow shorts. Gold pendant necklace and hoop earrings accent her relaxed look. Behind her, grey walls with wainscoting display KAWS-style artwork with red background and blue-black figures. Warm ambient lighting from a wall sconce creates soft shadows. Natural skin texture with visible tan lines. Influencer lifestyle portrait with 2000s digital camera aesthetic.
flux-kontext-max.editing_prompt: Change the wall art to a different style while keeping the woman's pose and outfit the same. Preserve the warm lighting and cozy atmosphere.
flux-kontext-max.notes: Natural language with preservation clauses for editing mode, 512 token limit

playbook_principles_applied: 1_hierarchical_specificity: Detailed branded clothing (specific text, font, graphics), named art style (KAWS)
2_realism_anchors: 'visible tan lines', 'natural skin texture with pores', 'fabric texture', 'branded graphics'
3_technical_camera: '35-50mm portrait lens', 'shallow DOF', '2000s digital camera aesthetic'
4_negative_hygiene: prevents cartoon, airbrushed, plastic skin looks
5_spatial_consistency: clear pose description with arm and leg positions
6_lighting_storytelling: 'warm diffused indoor mix' = cozy home comfort mood
7_brand_integration: specific Hawaiian Tropic branding adds authenticity
